lore.shortDescription: A protective ring of cinders blunts incoming harm.
lore.fullText: A ring of smoldering cinders surrounds you in a 10-foot radius aura. You and creatures of your choice in the aura have resistance to cold damage. A hostile creature that enters the aura for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there takes 2d8 fire damage.
lore.higherLevel: When you cast this spell using a slot of 5th level or higher, the fire damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.
